title: Minimum Spanning Trees and Network Design · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A regional planner must compare route, connection, and dependency decisions. Deliver strong-component, shortest-path, and minimum-spanning analyses with precondition and limitation evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Weighted Network Planning Board with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent disjoint sets as parent forests with explicit representative invariants.
Apply union by rank or size without corrupting representative metadata.
Trace path compression and explain its interaction with later finds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
